title: Lami mahjong
notes:
Summer sizzle is here – and so is a fresh new game experience! 
1.Two new events: "Glamour Star" & "Online Gift" – Packed with surprises!
2.A cool summer makeover – Fresh visuals for a breezier vibe.
3.Whack‑a‑Mole now with a mole lucky wheel for extra thrills!
4.Leaderboard display optimized for clearer rankings.
5.Improved in-game UI adaptation across different screen sizes.
6.Multiple bug fixes for smoother, more stable gameplay.

title: Sky: Children of the Light
notes:
Art You Can Walk Through
Explore beautiful, playable environments made from Van Gogh's best known paintings, from sunlit fields in the Netherlands to the glowing night skies that only he could imagine. Each and every landscape is a work of art in motion, rendered in his bold, expressive brushstroke style and alive with the emotion he poured into every canvas.

For details: http://bit.ly/sky-patchnotes

Follow us for news:
- Discord/Facebook/X/Instagram/TikTok: @thatskygame
- YouTube/Twitch: @tha
